goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'moderate' price range and should be in the 'east'.
The hotel should 'include free wifi'.
Make sure you get 'hotel type' and 'whether they have free parking'.
You are also looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be 'in the same area as the hotel' and should serve 'indian' food.
The restaurant should be in the 'same price range as the hotel'.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the moderate price range and should be in the east
The hotel should include free wifi
Make sure you get hotel type and whether they have free parking
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the same area as the hotel and should serve indian food
The restaurant should be in the same price range as the hotel
Make sure you get phone number
